title: OpenCut README at pinned rewrite commit
author: OpenCut-app
snippet: The project is being rewritten; Editor API, plugins, Rust core, MCP, and headless are future work; classic is recommended today.
claims: current rewrite is not an editor integration target
classic is the current source reference

title: OpenCut roadmap
author: OpenCut-app
snippet: The roadmap begins with the main layout, header, sidebar, timeline container, and component foundation.
claims: rewrite editor capabilities are still roadmap items

title: OpenCut classic web editor source at pinned commit
author: OpenCut-app
snippet: Archived source contains editor page, assets, properties, preview, timeline, storage, renderer, and transcription implementations.
claims: classic contains useful editor UI source
classic engine and persistence are tightly coupled

title: shadcn-admin source at pinned commit
author: satnaing
snippet: The repository contains responsive accessible shell, sidebar, header, navigation groups, switcher, and settings layout; README says it is not a starter project.
claims: whole-project cloning is not the intended use

title: shadcn-admin official live application
author: satnaing
snippet: Official deployed application demonstrates the shell, responsive navigation, settings, and empty/loading patterns.
claims: shell interaction patterns are demonstrable independently of VideoBox

title: shadcn/ui v4 registry source at pinned commit
author: shadcn-ui
snippet: Open-code registry includes Sidebar, Empty, Button, Card, Dialog, Sheet, and other owned source components.
claims: components are distributed as source code

title: shadcn/ui Sidebar documentation
author: shadcn-ui
snippet: SidebarProvider composes desktop collapse, mobile state, header/content/footer, rail, inset, and keyboard toggle.
claims: canonical sidebar supports the required responsive shell primitives

title: Supabase Studio layout source at pinned commit
author: Supabase
snippet: Studio layout source contains organization/project hierarchy, project layout, navigation bars, settings layouts, and mobile navigation with deep workspace dependencies.
claims: Supabase is useful as IA reference
direct source port has high dependency cost

title: Supabase Platform documentation
author: Supabase
snippet: The product hierarchy organizes organizations, projects, members, billing, and project services.
claims: project and organization hierarchy is a stable product pattern

title: Opencast Editor source at pinned develop commit
author: Opencast
snippet: Source contains segment and subtitle state, waveform timeline, cue drag and resize, video players, keyboard controls, and Opencast-specific clients.
claims: pure cue and timeline interactions are reusable
framework and API client are project-specific

title: Opencast Editor official deployed application
author: Opencast
snippet: The official application exposes cutting, waveform, subtitle editing, and preview workflows.
claims: waveform and subtitle editing are established Opencast workflows

title: Pretendard font license at v1.3.9 commit
author: Kil Hyung-jin and contributors
snippet: Pretendard is licensed under SIL Open Font License 1.1.
claims: Pretendard can be locally bundled with OFL notice

title: Pretendard package metadata
author: orioncactus
snippet: Package metadata provides the Korean-capable font family and system fallback recommendation.
claims: font can be self-hosted instead of loaded from an external runtime CDN
